title: What Should a Good Website Design Include?
excerpt: A good website is more than just an attractive homepage. It includes the right pages, the right content elements, and the right technical foundations to attract visitors, earn their trust, and convert them into customers. This post is your complete checklist.
content:
When commissioning a new website, it's easy to focus on how it looks — but a truly effective website needs to include the right structural and strategic elements to perform. Here's what to insist on.

Essential Pages Every Business Website Needs

  • Homepage: Your digital front door. It should communicate what you do, who you serve, and what makes you different — within seconds.
  • About Page: People buy from people. A strong About page builds trust and humanizes your brand.
  • Services or Products Page: Clearly describes what you offer, with specific outcomes and benefits.
  • Contact Page: Makes it easy for potential customers to reach you. Include a form, phone number, email, and physical address if relevant.
  • Blog or Resources (if applicable): Drives organic traffic and positions you as an authority.

Key Design Elements

  • Clear navigation: Visitors should find what they need within 2 clicks.
  • Strong calls to action (CTAs): Every page should guide the visitor toward a next step.
  • Trust signals: Testimonials, client logos, certifications, case studies, and review scores.
  • Mobile responsiveness: Flawless display on every screen size.
  • Fast load speed: No visitor should wait more than 3 seconds.
  • Accessible design: Readable fonts, sufficient color contrast, keyboard-navigable.

Technical Must-Haves

  • SSL certificate (HTTPS)
  • SEO-friendly URL structure and meta data
  • XML sitemap
  • Connected analytics (Google Analytics or equivalent)
  • Privacy policy and cookie notice

Content Requirements

  • Professional copywriting aligned with your audience
  • High-quality, authentic imagery (avoid obvious stock photos)
  • Clear value proposition prominently displayed
  • Social proof above the fold

We Build Websites That Have It All
